_comment: Workflows listed here are infrastructure (app servers, orchestrators, design previews, etc.) — not test suites. The sync guard in check-run-all-tests-sync.js reads this file to decide which workflows to skip when diffing against run-all-tests.sh. Add a new entry here whenever you introduce a non-test workflow; do NOT edit the JS file.
_missing_file_behaviour: If this file is deleted or renamed, check-run-all-tests-sync.js falls back to its built-in DEFAULT_INFRASTRUCTURE_WORKFLOWS constant and prints a WARNING — the sync check still runs rather than aborting. Restore this file (keeping the same infrastructureWorkflows entries) to suppress the warning. Also update DEFAULT_INFRASTRUCTURE_WORKFLOWS in the JS file if the two lists diverge.
_scriptOnlySuites_comment: scriptOnlySuites are test suites registered in run-all-tests.sh that run as direct shell/Python scripts. They have no dedicated workflow entry in .replit (and do not need one). Add a suite here when the workflow limit is reached or when a suite is too lightweight to warrant a persistent workflow.
